gold_gain_multiplier.description: Multiplier for all gold gained from kills. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double gold.

offline_reward_multiplier.description: Multiplier for offline rewards. 1.0 = normal, 1.5 = +50% offline income.

player_damage_multiplier.description: Multiplier for player damage output. 1.0 = normal, 0.8 = nerf, 1.2 = buff.

enemy_hp_multiplier.description: Multiplier for enemy HP. 1.0 = normal, 0.8 = easier, 1.3 = harder.

auto_attack_interval_sec.description: Seconds between auto attacks. Lower = faster. Min ~0.2.

kills_per_stage.description: Number of kills required to advance to the next stage.

forge_extra_bonus.description: Extra forge bonus added on top of normal forge output. 0.0 = none.

event_gold_bonus.description: Temporary event gold bonus added to gold_gain_multiplier. Set to 0.5 for a weekend +50% gold event, reset to 0.0 afterwards.
